title: Capsizing and Sinking of Towing Vessel Baylor J. Tregre
location: Gulf of America, 23 nm south of Galveston, Texas
probable_cause: Mate's inability to maneuver tow into wind due to overwhelming towline force during sudden severe weather, resulting in unrecoverable heeling
known_caveats: This is a final investigation report with probable cause determined
Report issued May 15, 2025, more than 1 year after the casualty
Weather data from stations 22-27 nm from actual casualty site
Salvage operations modified wreckage before full examination
Storm characteristics (possible waterspout) not definitively confirmed
